name: Google Workspace Privileged Accounts on Personal Email Domains
description: Detects privileged google_workspace accounts tied to personal email domains.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.primary_email AS email FROM google_workspace_users u WHERE 1=1 AND (COALESCE(u.is_admin, false) = true) AND LOWER(COALESCE(u.primary_email, '')) SIMILAR TO '%@(gmail|yahoo|hotmail|outlook)\\.com'
remediation: Migrate privileged accounts to corporate identity domains and remove personal-domain privileged access.
